arts.ttl: Manchester City v Chelsea: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates on the 5.30pm kick-off at the Etihad Any comments. Feel free to email Scott Rather unexpectedly, this match is probably not going to have a huge bearing on the title race … though you never know. What we do know for sure is that it’s a repeat of the classic 1986 Full Members’ Cup final. So nostalgia fans should get stuck into this ☟☟☟☟☟☟. Kick-off this evening is at 5.30pm. It’s on! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Fernandez, Marmoush, Khusanov, Reis: Any surprises in Man City, Chelsea XIs?
arts.sum: Manchester City, Chelsea announce their first XIs for Saturday's Premier League fixture.

arts.ttl: Fit-again Miedema a tonic for troubled Man City
arts.sum: There is light at the end of the tunnel for injury-hit Manchester City in the form of Vivianne Miedema, who looks close to her best after three months out.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Chelsea - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's men looking to bounce back from PSG defeat against injury struck Blues
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester City host Chelsea at the Etihad in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix left out of Chelsea squad for Man City clash with club granting leave
arts.sum: Joao Felix has only played 12 games for the Blues since sealing a £46million move from Atletico Madrid last summer and has been linked with a move away from Stamford Bridge this week

arts.ttl: Sky Sports forced to apologise to Man City live on air after controversial comments
arts.sum: Manchester City made three signings this month as Omar Marmoush, Vitor Reis and Abdukodir Khusanov all arrived at the Etihad, with Sky Sports pundit Tim Sherwood saying the club "make their own rules up"

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker rejected by European giants before completing Man City exit to Milan
arts.sum: Kyle Walker was offered to another club before completing his loan move to AC Milan this month.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Alejandro Garnacho transfer deal concern raised as Jadon Sancho point made
arts.sum: With Garnacho's future at United uncertain and Chelsea interested, Sky Sports Germany then claimed on Friday that a swap deal, involving the Argentine and Christopher Nkunku, is being considered. TV pundit Paul Merson has questioned why Chelsea are considering signing Alejandro Garnacho from Manchester United this month - and doesn't see where he would fit into Enzo Maresca's side.

arts.ttl: Player ‘has an offer from Chelsea’ – Considering his options as Blues face transfer competition
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund winger Karim Adeyemi has an offer on the table from Chelsea but is considering his options as Napoli are also keen. That’s according to Sky Italia, via Area Napoli, who report that Chelsea are in the mix for the German forward. Napoli are on the hunt for a replacement for Khvicha Kvaratshkelia after The post Player ‘has an offer from Chelsea’ – Considering his options as Blues face transfer competition appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Martin Odegaard, Mikel Merino absences from Arsenal's clash with Wolves amid Man City fear
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta explains the reasons for Martin Odegaard and Mikel Merino's unexpected absences from the Gunners' squad to face Wolverhampton Wanderers.
